data.body:
TASK-DECOMPOSITION RESEARCH SESSION (job e5b41784, 2026-07-15) — full trail.

DELIVERED:
- docs/research/task-decomposition-sota-2026.md committed on main as 143d5074e (subject 'englacial-communal-conure: add task-decomposition SOTA report + plan-review gap analysis and recommendations', trailer rebar-ticket: d39b-8c45-385c-418a).
- Ticket d39b-8c45-385c-418a (englacial-communal-conure): 3 plan-review rounds (round 1 BLOCK on unpinned ~/Downloads inputs + unspecified mining method; round 2 PASS signed, advisories applied pre-claim; round 3 PASS signed), claimed by claude-fable-5, CLOSED with signed completion-verifier attestation (first close attempt FAILed on git-metadata evidence; resolved by recording the trailer proof as a ticket comment).
- Idea epic 6982-2e75-f8fa-43b9 parks recommendations R1-R7, linked discovered_from d39b.

KEY EVIDENCE (details + citations in the report):
- Store history: 1,897 plan reviews / 527 tickets (PASS 47% / BLOCK 45% / INDET 8%); 30% of candidate findings dropped by pass 2/3; 68% of tickets >=2 rounds; 92% of BLOCKed tickets converge to PASS. Post-claim description edits: 16/505 claimed work tickets (3.2%), 15 substantive. Of 8 with persisted reviews: 3 MISSED / 4 CAUGHT-BUT-IGNORED / 1 UNKNOWABLE. Both clean misses = asserted-capability-of-existing-module grounding failures (dc58 sign step, db7b compaction retention); third miss via bug gate-exemption (5886). Dominant leak = advisory latency, not detection.
- External anchors: Tricorder <10% FP trust cliff; CORE find-then-verify -25.8% FP; AQUSA 93.8R/72.2P deterministic ceiling; static decomposition can be WORSE than monolithic (arXiv:2605.15425); FixedBench 35-65% over-action; incompleteness/inconsistency predict failure, ambiguity alone does not.

RECOMMENDATIONS (report section 6, each with falsifiable experiment + FP assessment): R1 asserted-capability probe (pass 1, G6/E4 rubric + P2 symbol-in-module DET extension); R2 operator-attested evidence-kind lint (pass 1 DET / P6; pilotable via .rebar overlay per ADR 0016); R3 decomposition-shape container criterion (layer-cake + consumption-vs-ordering; consider promoting G4's dependency-gap mode, precedent g7-promotion-path.md); R4 necessity/no-op gate + lightweight bug review tier; R5 asserted_capability_confirmed sub-answer in review_kernel GRADED_BINARY (MUST default na outside G6/E4/T3 cohort + bump IMPACT_MODEL_VERSION + code-review non-regression replay); R6 advisory-triage coaching move (pass 4, MOVE_REGISTRY); R7 gate-eval outcome instrumentation extending docs/experiments/plan-review-gate. Priority: R7, R2, R1+R5, R6, R4, R3.

EXPERIMENT PROGRAM designed for validation-before-implementation (E1 ground-truth corpora with kappa>=0.7 adjudication; E2 seeded-defect mutant benchmark >=80% detection / <=10% blocking-FP on controls; E3 counterfactual replay <=2% PASS->BLOCK flips on clean-closed tickets + the 3 MISSED cases must surface; E4 prospective A/B on SURROGATE endpoints — post-claim edit rate at 3.2% is too rare to power a short A/B; E5 cross-gate kernel non-regression via code_review_adjudication.jsonl; E6 3-vote self-consistency Fleiss kappa>=0.6 on new sub-answers; E7 standing FP monitor with demote-to-advisory response).

ARTIFACTS (ephemeral, job tmp — may be cleaned): /Users/joeoakhart/.claude/jobs/e5b41784/tmp/ holds mine.py, events.jsonl (full ticket-event history recovered from git objects across all refs of the tickets branch — the on-disk .tickets-tracker is compacted to snapshots), plan_review_summary.json, xref.json, top_editors.json, review3.json. Regeneration method documented in report section 5.
